gist.headline: Pruning the pipeline
gist.blurb: We've tidied up our automated publishing workflows by removing some deprecated packages. Just keeping the garden neat and tidy!
gist.summary: Removed the deprecated @pollinations_ai/ompc package from the automated package publishing CI pipeline.
gist.impact: Streamlines the CI/CD process by skipping builds for deprecated packages, saving build time and keeping the workflow clean.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about cleaning up a CI pipeline and removing old/deprecated things. The Nomnom creature loves eating deprecated code/logs. The bee can be sweeping or organizing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a stack of old deprecated CI workflow files while the bee mascot sweeps the floor with a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
